parameters.query:
INSERT INTO zikra.memories (project, module, memory_type, title, content_md, tags, resolution, created_by)
VALUES (
    '{{ ($('Zikra Webhook').first().json.body.project || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    {{ $('Zikra Webhook').first().json.body.module ? "'" + $('Zikra Webhook').first().json.body.module.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    '{{ ($('Zikra Webhook').first().json.body.memory_type || "conversation").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    '{{ ($('Zikra Webhook').first().json.body.title || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    '{{ ($('Zikra Webhook').first().json.body.content_md || $('Zikra Webhook').first().json.body.content || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    '{{ Array.isArray($('Zikra Webhook').first().json.body.tags) && $('Zikra Webhook').first().json.body.tags.length > 0 ? "{" + $('Zikra Webhook').first().json.body.tags.join(",") + "}" : "{}" }}'::TEXT[],
    {{ $('Zikra Webhook').first().json.body.resolution ? "'" + $('Zikra Webhook').first().json.body.resolution.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $('Zikra Webhook').first().json.body.created_by ? "'" + $('Zikra Webhook').first().json.body.created_by.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }}
)
ON CONFLICT (title, memory_type) DO NOTHING
RETURNING id;

UPDATE zikra.memories
SET embedding = '{{ "["+$json.data[0].embedding.join(",")+"]" }}'::vector
WHERE id = '{{ $("SM Lookup ID").first().json.id }}'::uuid
RETURNING id;

SELECT
    id,
    title,
    LEFT(content_md, 500) AS snippet,
    memory_type,
    project,
    module,
    ROUND((
        0.7 * (1 - (embedding <=> '[{{ $("SR Embed").first().json.data[0].embedding.join(",") }}]'::vector))
        +
        0.3 * ts_rank_cd(
            to_tsvector('english', coalesce(title,'') || ' ' || coalesce(content_md,'')),
            plainto_tsquery('english', '{{ $("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.query.replace(/\'/g,"''") }}')
        )
    )::numeric, 4) AS score,
    created_at,
    access_count,
    confidence_score
FROM zikra.memories
WHERE searchable = true
  AND embedding IS NOT NULL
  AND (
    '{{ $("Auth Lookup").first().json.role }}' = 'owner'
    OR project = '{{ $("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.project }}'
    OR project = 'global'
  )
ORDER BY score DESC
LIMIT {{ $("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.max_results || 5 }};

WITH upd AS (
    UPDATE zikra.memories
    SET access_count = access_count + 1
    WHERE memory_type = 'prompt'
      AND (
        (
          LOWER(title) = LOWER('{{ ($("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.prompt_name||"").replace(/'/g,"''") }}')
          AND '{{ $("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.prompt_name||"" }}' != ''
        )
        OR
        (id::text = '{{ $("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.prompt_id||"" }}' AND '{{ $("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.prompt_id||"" }}' != '')
      )
    RETURNING id, title, content_md, project, access_count
)
SELECT * FROM upd LIMIT 1;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ id: $json.id, title: $json.title, project: $json.project, access_count: $json.access_count, content_md: $json.content_md, _use_command: "get_prompt" }) }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO zikra.memories (project, module, memory_type, title, content_md, tags, resolved)
VALUES (
    '{{ $("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.project }}',
    {{ $("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.module ? "'" + $("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.module + "'" : "NULL" }},
    'error',
    '{{ ($("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.title||"").replace(/'/g,"''") }}',
    '{{ ($("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.content||"").replace(/'/g,"''") }}',
    '{{ "{" + ($("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.tags||[]).join(",") + "}" }}'::TEXT[],
    false
)
RETURNING id;

UPDATE zikra.memories
SET embedding = '{{ "["+$json.data[0].embedding.join(",")+"]" }}'::vector
WHERE id = '{{ $("LE Insert").first().json.id }}'::uuid
RETURNING id;

WITH active AS (
    DELETE FROM zikra.active_runs
    WHERE runner = '{{ $("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.runner || "unknown" }}'
    RETURNING prompt_id, prompt_name
)
INSERT INTO zikra.prompt_runs
    (prompt_id, session_id, status, output_summary, errors, files_modified,
     tokens_input, tokens_output, tokens_cache_read, tokens_cache_creation,
     cost_usd, runner)
SELECT
    COALESCE(
        active.prompt_id,
        {{ ($("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.prompt_id && $("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.prompt_id.match(/^[0-9a-f-]{36}$/i)) ? "'" + $("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.prompt_id + "'::uuid" : "NULL" }}
    ),
    '{{ $("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.session_id||"" }}',
    '{{ $("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.status||"success" }}',
    '{{ ($("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.output_summary||"").replace(/'/g,"''") }}',
    '{{ "{" + ($("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.errors||[]).join(",") + "}" }}'::TEXT[],
    '{{ "{" + ($("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.files_modified||[]).join(",") + "}" }}'::TEXT[],
    {{ $("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.tokens_input != null ? $("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.tokens_input : "NULL" }},
    {{ $("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.tokens_output != null ? $("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.tokens_output : "NULL" }},
    {{ $("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.tokens_cache_read != null ? $("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.tokens_cache_read : "NULL" }},
    {{ $("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.tokens_cache_creation != null ? $("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.tokens_cache_creation : "NULL" }},
    {{ $("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.cost_usd != null ? $("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.cost_usd : "NULL" }},
    '{{ $("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.runner || "unknown" }}'
FROM (SELECT NULL::uuid AS prompt_id, NULL::text AS prompt_name) AS fallback
LEFT JOIN active ON true
RETURNING id;

WITH upd AS (
    UPDATE zikra.memories
    SET access_count = access_count + 1
    WHERE memory_type = 'prompt' AND title = 'debug_protocol'
    RETURNING id, title, content_md, access_count
)
SELECT * FROM upd LIMIT 1;

WITH errors_cte AS (
    SELECT json_agg(json_build_object(
        'title',title,'snippet',LEFT(content_md,200),'created_at',created_at::text
    ) ORDER BY created_at DESC) AS data
    FROM (SELECT title,content_md,created_at FROM zikra.memories
          WHERE project='{{ $("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.project }}'
            AND memory_type='error' AND resolved=false
          ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 3) e
),
schema_cte AS (
    SELECT content_md FROM zikra.memories
    WHERE memory_type='schema' AND project='{{ $("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.project }}'
    {{ $("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.module ? "AND module='"+$("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.module+"'" : "" }}
    ORDER BY version DESC LIMIT 1
),
prompts_cte AS (
    SELECT json_agg(json_build_object(
        'title',title,'snippet',LEFT(content_md,200)
    ) ORDER BY access_count DESC) AS data
    FROM (SELECT title,content_md,access_count FROM zikra.memories
          WHERE memory_type='prompt'
            AND (project='{{ $("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.project }}' OR project='global')
          ORDER BY access_count DESC LIMIT 5) p
),
decisions_cte AS (
    SELECT json_agg(json_build_object(
        'title',title,'snippet',LEFT(content_md,200)
    ) ORDER BY created_at DESC) AS data
    FROM (SELECT title,content_md,created_at FROM zikra.memories
          WHERE memory_type='decision'
            AND (project='{{ $("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.project }}' OR project='global')
          ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 3) d
)
SELECT
    (SELECT data FROM errors_cte)               AS errors,
    (SELECT content_md FROM schema_cte LIMIT 1) AS schema_content,
    (SELECT data FROM prompts_cte)              AS prompts,
    (SELECT data FROM decisions_cte)            AS decisions;

parameters.responseBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  error: "Unknown or missing command: " + $("Command Normaliser").first().json.body._raw_command,
  _received_command: $("Command Normaliser").first().json.body._raw_command || $("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.command,
  _use_command: "unknown — see commands list above",
  hint: "Send a POST request with a JSON body containing a 'command' field and a Bearer token in the Authorization header.",
  system: "Zikra — AI persistent memory system. Webhook: https://n8n.veltisai.com/webhook/zikra",
  projects: ["veltisai", "molten8", "zikra", "global"],
  commands: {
    search: { description: "Search memories by keyword", aliases: ["find","query","recall","lookup","search_memory","retrieve","remember"] },
    save_memory: { description: "Save a decision, note, or context", aliases: ["save","store","write_memory","add_memory","write"] },
    get_prompt: { description: "Fetch a named prompt", aliases: ["run_prompt","fetch_prompt","load_prompt","execute_prompt"] },
    get_memory: { description: "Fetch full content of one memory by exact title or UUID" },
    log_run: { description: "Log session end", aliases: ["log_session","end_session","finish_run","log_completion"] },
    log_error: { description: "Log a bug", aliases: ["log_bug","report_error","save_error","log_failure"] },
    sync_claudemd: { description: "Sync CLAUDE.md", aliases: ["sync","claudemd"] },
    debug_protocol: { description: "Debug unresolved errors", aliases: ["debug","dp"] },
    get_schema: { description: "Get DB schema", aliases: ["schema","get_db"] },
    save_requirement: { description: "Submit a requirement for review" },
    list_requirements: { description: "List pending requirements" },
    promote_requirement: { description: "Promote requirement to prompt (owner only)" },
    create_token: { description: "Create access token (owner only)" }
  }
}) }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO zikra.active_runs (runner, prompt_id, prompt_name)
VALUES (
    '{{ $('Zikra Webhook').first().json.body.runner || "unknown" }}',
    '{{ $('GP Query').first().json.id }}',
    '{{ $('GP Query').first().json.title }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (runner) DO UPDATE SET
    prompt_id   = EXCLUDED.prompt_id,
    prompt_name = EXCLUDED.prompt_name,
    started_at  = now();

SELECT at.token, at.person_name, 
  '{{ $json.body.project || "global" }}' AS project,
  tp.role
FROM zikra.access_tokens at
JOIN zikra.token_projects tp ON tp.token_id = at.id
WHERE at.token = COALESCE(
  NULLIF('{{ ($json.headers.authorization || $json.headers.Authorization || "").replace("Bearer ", "") }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.body.zikra_token || "" }}', '')
)
  AND at.active = true
  AND (
    tp.project = '{{ $json.body.project || "global" }}'
    OR tp.role = 'owner'
  )
LIMIT 1
UPDATE zikra.access_tokens SET last_used = now() WHERE token = '{{ $("Zikra Webhook").first().json.headers.authorization.replace("Bearer ", "") }}'

INSERT INTO zikra.memories (project, memory_type, title, content_md, created_by, pending_review, searchable)
VALUES (
    '{{ $("Auth Lookup").first().json.project }}',
    'requirement',
    '{{ ($("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.title||"").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    '{{ ($("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.content_md||"").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    '{{ $("Auth Lookup").first().json.person_name }}',
    true,
    true
) RETURNING id

UPDATE zikra.memories
SET memory_type = 'prompt', pending_review = false, updated_at = now()
WHERE id = '{{ $("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.requirement_id }}'::uuid
  AND memory_type = 'requirement'
RETURNING id, title

SELECT id, title, LEFT(content_md, 300) AS snippet,
       created_by, created_at, project
FROM zikra.memories
WHERE memory_type = 'requirement'
  AND pending_review = true
  AND (
    '{{ $("Auth Lookup").first().json.role }}' = 'owner'
    OR project = '{{ $("Auth Lookup").first().json.project }}'
  )
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 20

parameters.jsCode:
const rows = $input.all().map(i => i.json);
return [{json:{count: rows.length, requirements: rows}}];

parameters.query:
WITH new_token AS (
  INSERT INTO zikra.access_tokens (token, project, person_name)
  VALUES (
    LOWER(LEFT(REGEXP_REPLACE('{{ ($("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.project||"global").replace(/[^a-z0-9]/gi,"") }}', '[^a-z0-9]', '', 'g'), 4))
    || '-' || SUBSTRING(MD5(RANDOM()::text), 1, 8),
    '{{ $("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.project || "global" }}',
    '{{ ($("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.person_name||"").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
  )
  RETURNING id, token, project, person_name
), new_tp AS (
  INSERT INTO zikra.token_projects (token_id, project, role)
  SELECT id, project, '{{ $("Zikra Webhook").first().json.body.role || "contributor" }}'
  FROM new_token
  RETURNING token_id
)
SELECT t.token, t.project, t.person_name FROM new_token t

parameters.toolDescription:
Search Zikra for memories, decisions, prompts, and errors. Always search before starting work to load relevant context.

Use command: search. Aliases accepted: find, query, recall, lookup, search_memory, retrieve, remember.
Do NOT use get_memory for broad searches — use this tool.

Required fields:
- query (string): what to search for
- project (string): project name

Optional:
- max_results (integer, default 5)
- max_tokens (integer, default 1500): token budget for results

values.name: query
values.description: The search query string

values.name: project
values.description: Project name to search within

values.name: max_results
values.description: Maximum number of results (default: 5)

values.name: zikra_token
values.description: Your personal Zikra bearer token (e.g. velt-xxxxxxxx). Required for identity tracking.

parameters.toolDescription:
Save a memory to Zikra. Use to record decisions, completed work, or important context.

Use command: save_memory. Aliases accepted: save, store, write_memory, add_memory, write, remember.

Required fields:
- title (string): short descriptive title
- content_md (string): full content in markdown
- project (string): project name
- memory_type (string): decision | conversation | error | schema | prompt

Optional:
- module (string)
- tags (array of strings)
- created_by (string)

values.name: title
values.description: Memory title

values.name: content_md
values.description: Memory content in markdown

values.name: project
values.description: Project name

values.name: memory_type
values.description: Type: decision, error, conversation, prompt, schema

values.name: created_by
values.description: Who created this memory (e.g. hostname)

values.name: zikra_token
values.description: Your personal Zikra bearer token (e.g. velt-xxxxxxxx). Required for identity tracking.

parameters.toolDescription:
Fetch a named prompt from Zikra and execute its steps. Use when asked to 'run prompt: <name>'.

Use command: get_prompt. Aliases accepted: run_prompt, fetch_prompt, load_prompt, execute_prompt.

Required fields:
- prompt_name (string): exact prompt name, e.g. 'g:sync_zikra'
- project (string): project name
- runner (string): hostname of the machine running this

values.name: prompt_name
values.description: Name of the prompt to fetch (e.g. g:my_prompt)

values.name: project
values.description: Project name

values.name: runner
values.description: Hostname or identifier of the runner

values.name: zikra_token
values.description: Your personal Zikra bearer token (e.g. velt-xxxxxxxx). Required for identity tracking.

parameters.toolDescription:
Log the end of a work session or prompt run. Call this at the end of every named prompt execution.

Required fields:
- output_summary (string): 1-2 sentences describing what was accomplished
- project (string): one of veltisai, molten8, zikra, global
- runner (string): your hostname or identifier
- status (string): "success" or "error"

Optional:
- session_id (string): session UUID if available
- prompt_id (string): UUID of the prompt that was run

Returns: {status: "logged", id: uuid}

IMPORTANT: If you called zikra_get_prompt earlier in this session, pass the returned id as prompt_id in this log_run call. This links the run to the prompt in Zikra for tracking.

Example with prompt linkage:
- output_summary: "Implemented token passthrough for all 11 MCP tool nodes."
- project: "zikra"
- runner: "veltisai"
- status: "success"
- prompt_id: "b5317765-cfe8-4292-b4a5-915fd73d2b6c"
- zikra_token: "velt-xxxxxxxx"

values.name: output_summary
values.description: Concise 2-sentence summary of what was done

values.name: project
values.description: Project name

values.name: runner
values.description: Hostname or identifier

values.name: status
values.description: success or error

values.name: zikra_token
values.description: Your personal Zikra bearer token (e.g. velt-xxxxxxxx). Required for identity tracking.

parameters.toolDescription:
Log a bug or unexpected failure to Zikra so it can be tracked and resolved.

Required fields:
- title (string): short description of the error, e.g. "Login button not rendering on mobile"
- content_md (string): full details — what happened, what was expected, stack trace if available
- project (string): one of veltisai, molten8, zikra, global

Returns: {status: "logged", id: uuid}

values.name: title
values.description: Short error title

values.name: content_md
values.description: Error context and details

values.name: project
values.description: Project name

values.name: zikra_token
values.description: Your personal Zikra bearer token (e.g. velt-xxxxxxxx). Required for identity tracking.

parameters.toolDescription:
Submit a new feature requirement or change request for owner review.
Use when you want to propose something new — the owner (Mukarram) will review and promote it to a prompt.

Required fields:
- title (string): short requirement title, e.g. "Add dark mode toggle to dashboard"
- content_md (string): full requirement description — what, why, acceptance criteria

Project and created_by are set automatically from your token.
Requirements are pending until promoted. Use zikra_list_requirements to see pending items.

Returns: {status: "saved", type: "requirement", id: uuid, pending_review: true}

values.name: title
values.description: Requirement title

values.name: content_md
values.description: Full requirement description in markdown

values.name: zikra_token
values.description: Your personal Zikra bearer token (e.g. velt-xxxxxxxx). Required for identity tracking.

parameters.toolDescription:
List all pending requirements waiting for owner review.
No parameters needed — results are scoped to your project automatically.

Use this to:
- See what requirements have been submitted
- Check if your requirement was saved
- Review pending items before a planning session

Returns: {count: number, requirements: [{id, title, snippet, created_by, created_at}]}

values.name: zikra_token
values.description: Your personal Zikra bearer token (e.g. velt-xxxxxxxx). Required for identity tracking.

parameters.toolDescription:
Fetch the full content of a specific memory by title or UUID.
Use when a search result shows a relevant memory but you need the complete content.

Use command: get_memory. Aliases accepted: fetch_memory, read_memory, load_memory.
Use this ONLY for fetching one specific memory by exact title or UUID.
For broad searches use zikra_search instead.

Required fields:
- title (string): exact memory title OR uuid

values.name: title
values.description: Memory title or UUID to fetch

values.name: zikra_token
values.description: Your personal Zikra bearer token (e.g. velt-xxxxxxxx). Required for identity tracking.

parameters.toolDescription:
Fetch the current database or module schema for a project. Use when working on backend code, migrations, or anything requiring knowledge of table structure.

Required fields:
- project (string): one of veltisai, molten8, zikra, global

Optional:
- module (string): specific module name to filter schema, e.g. "auth", "payments"

Returns: {content_md, title, version, module} — the schema in markdown format

values.name: project
values.description: Project name: veltisai, molten8, zikra, or global

values.name: module
values.description: Optional module name to filter schema

values.name: zikra_token
values.description: Your personal Zikra bearer token (e.g. velt-xxxxxxxx). Required for identity tracking.

parameters.toolDescription:
Promote a pending requirement to a prompt (owner only). Use after reviewing a requirement submitted by a collaborator.

Required fields:
- requirement_id (string): the UUID of the requirement to promote (get this from zikra_list_requirements)

What happens:
- The requirement memory_type changes from 'requirement' to 'prompt'
- It becomes available via zikra_get_prompt
- pending_review is set to false

Returns: {status: "promoted", id, title}

values.name: requirement_id
values.description: UUID of the requirement to promote (from zikra_list_requirements)

values.name: zikra_token
values.description: Your personal Zikra bearer token (e.g. velt-xxxxxxxx). Required for identity tracking.

parameters.toolDescription:
Create a new Zikra access token for a team member (owner only).

Required fields:
- person_name (string): the person's name, e.g. "Alice"
- project (string): which project to scope the token to: veltisai, molten8, zikra, or global
- role (string): one of owner, collaborator, guest
- persona (string): one of architect, developer, requirements_engineer

Roles:
- owner: full access, can promote requirements and create tokens
- collaborator: can save memories, submit requirements, log runs
- guest: read-only search access

Personas are used to track who does what work. Always set persona.

Returns: {id, token, project, role, person_name, persona}

values.name: person_name
values.description: Name of the person to create token for

values.name: project
values.description: Project scope: veltisai, molten8, zikra, or global

values.name: role
values.description: Role: owner, collaborator, or guest

values.name: persona
values.description: Persona: architect, developer, or requirements_engineer

values.name: zikra_token
values.description: Your personal Zikra bearer token (e.g. velt-xxxxxxxx). Required for identity tracking.
